title: strychnos divaricans
intro: Strychnos divaricans is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The health benefits of Strychnos divaricans include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antimalarial agent, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Strychnos divaricans are made by boiling the plant in water or mixing it with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or topical applications.
